primerTitle: Risk, markets & asset pricing — how to use it
primer:
## Risk, markets & asset pricing
Interview-screen MCQs on the markets-and-risk side of a quant/risk role, **one deck per area**, each card explained.
- **Market risk — VaR, ES & Greeks** — VaR vs Expected Shortfall, coherence/subadditivity, VaR methods, backtesting, option Greeks, duration & convexity.
- **Credit & other risk** — EL = PD×LGD×EAD, expected vs unexpected loss, counterparty/CVA/wrong-way risk, operational & model risk, the Basel pillars.
- **Portfolio & asset pricing** — CAPM & beta, Sharpe/Treynor/Sortino, the efficient frontier & CML, put–call parity, Black–Scholes intuition.
- **Applied cases** — scenario questions that test picking the right tool.
- **Nominal vs real, deflator & Fisher** — the one identity behind GDP growth, real returns and the Fisher equation.

Best drilled in exam mode.
